title: Day 2 Writing Exercise — Self Introduction
instructions: नीचे दिए गए prompts के आधार पर अपने शब्दों में English में लिखें। Space में अपना answer लिखें।

tasks.prompt: Write a 5-sentence formal self-introduction including your name, city, and profession.
tasks.hindiPrompt: 5 sentences में अपना formal introduction लिखें जिसमें नाम, शहर और profession शामिल हो।
tasks.sampleAnswer: My name is Aman Verma. I am from Jaipur, Rajasthan. I currently work as a marketing executive at a private firm. I have two years of experience in digital marketing. I am passionate about learning new skills every day.

tasks.prompt: Write an informal introduction to a new friend (3-4 sentences).
tasks.hindiPrompt: एक नए दोस्त को informal तरीके से अपना introduction दें (3-4 sentences)।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Hi! I'm Neha. I'm from Pune, but I live in Mumbai now. I love traveling and painting. What about you?

tasks.prompt: Write your 'Tell me about yourself' interview answer.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Interview के 'Tell me about yourself' सवाल का जवाब लिखें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Good morning. My name is Priya Singh. I completed my B.Tech in Computer Science from Delhi in 2021. I have been working as a software developer for two years at a reputed IT company. My key strength is problem-solving, and I am always eager to learn new technologies. I am looking forward to this opportunity.

tasks.prompt: Write about your family in 4-5 sentences using at least 3 vocabulary words from today's lesson.
tasks.hindiPrompt: अपने परिवार के बारे में 4-5 sentences लिखें, आज के lesson के कम से कम 3 words use करें।

tasks.prompt: Write your own 1-minute elevator pitch introducing yourself professionally.
